title: Weighted Shortest Paths and Relaxation ¬∑ Invariant Recall
summary: Choose safe routes across positive, negative, and unreachable weighted networks. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a multi-algorithm route engine with path proofs after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: State and apply edge relaxation while preserving predecessor evidence.
Run Dijkstra only under compatible nonnegative weights and stale-entry handling.
Use repeated relaxation to find shortest paths and reachable negative-cycle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
